nodes.name: get_database_analytics
nodes.description: Get comprehensive database analytics including total size, monthly growth trends,

nodes.name: get_monthly_growth_analytics
nodes.description: Get detailed growth analytics including vCon creation trends,

nodes.name: get_attachment_analytics
nodes.description: Get comprehensive attachment analytics including file type distribution,

nodes.name: get_tag_analytics
nodes.description: Get comprehensive tag analytics including usage patterns,

nodes.name: get_content_analytics
nodes.description: Get comprehensive content analytics including dialog types,

nodes.name: get_database_health_metrics
nodes.description: Get database health metrics including performance indicators,

nodes.name: get_database_size_info
nodes.description: Get database size information and smart recommendations for query limits.

nodes.name: get_smart_search_limits
nodes.description: Get smart search limits based on database size and query complexity.

nodes.name: get_database_shape
nodes.description: Get comprehensive database structure information including tables, indexes, sizes, and relationships.

nodes.name: get_database_stats
nodes.description: Get database performance and usage statistics including query performance, cache hit ratios,

nodes.name: analyze_query
nodes.description: Analyze a SQL query to understand its execution plan and performance characteristics.

nodes.name: get_schema
nodes.description: Get vCon schema definition in the requested format (json_schema or typescript).

nodes.name: get_examples
nodes.description: Get example vCons (minimal, phone_call, chat, email, video, full_featured) as JSON or YAML.

nodes.name: manage_tag
nodes.description: Add, update, or remove a single tag on a vCon. Tags are key-value pairs for categorization and filtering.

nodes.name: get_tags
nodes.description: Retrieve tags from a vCon. Provide a specific key to get one tag value, or omit key to get all tags as an object.

nodes.name: remove_all_tags
nodes.description: Remove all tags from a vCon.

nodes.name: search_by_tags
nodes.description: Search for vCons that have specific tag values. All specified tags must match (AND logic). REQUIRED: You must provide the tags parameter as an object with at least one key-value pair.

nodes.name: get_unique_tags
nodes.description: Get a list of all unique tag keys and their possible values across all vCons.

nodes.name: create_vcon_from_template
nodes.description: Create a new vCon from a predefined template (phone_call, chat_conversation, email_thread, video_meeting, custom).

nodes.name: create_vcon
nodes.description: Create a new vCon compliant with IETF draft-ietf-vcon-vcon-core-00.

nodes.name: get_vcon
nodes.description: Retrieve a vCon by its UUID. Use response_format to control how much data is returned:\n

nodes.name: search_vcons
nodes.description: Search for vCons using various criteria including tags, date ranges, and party info. Returns matching vCons.

nodes.name: search_vcons_content
nodes.description: Full-text keyword search across vCon content including subject, dialog, analysis, and party info.

nodes.name: search_vcons_semantic
nodes.description: Semantic search using AI embeddings to find conversations by meaning, not just keywords.

nodes.name: search_vcons_hybrid
nodes.description: Hybrid search combining keyword and semantic search for comprehensive results.

nodes.name: add_analysis
nodes.description: Add analysis to an existing vCon. Analysis represents AI/ML processing results like transcripts, summaries, or sentiment.

nodes.name: add_dialog
nodes.description: Add a dialog (conversation segment) to an existing vCon. Dialog can be a recording, text, transfer, or incomplete.

nodes.name: add_attachment
nodes.description: Add an attachment to an existing vCon. Attachments can be files, documents, or other data related to the conversation.

nodes.name: delete_vcon
nodes.description: Delete a vCon and all its related data (parties, dialog, analysis, attachments). This operation cannot be undone.

nodes.name: update_vcon
nodes.description: Update top-level vCon metadata (subject, extensions, must_support). For dialog, analysis, attachments use their specific tools.

nodes.name: discover_available_tags
nodes.description: Discover what tags are available in the system for filtering. Perfect for exploring your data and understanding what categories, departments, priorities, or other metadata exists.

nodes.name: find_similar_conversations
nodes.description: Find conversations similar to a specific vCon or topic. Uses semantic search to find conceptually related conversations.

nodes.name: reference
nodes.description: Either a vCon UUID to find similar conversations, or a description of the topic

nodes.name: limit
nodes.description: Number of similar conversations to return (default: 10)

nodes.name: daily_activity_report
nodes.description: Generate a comprehensive daily activity report for a specific date. Uses analytics tools and targeted searches instead of manual sampling for accurate, efficient reporting.

nodes.name: date
nodes.description: The date to report on in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g.,

nodes.description: Optional focus areas for the report (e.g.,

nodes.name: help_me_search
nodes.description: Get guidance on the best way to search for vCons based on your needs. Explains which search tool to use (exact tags, keywords, semantic, or hybrid) and how to structure your query.

nodes.name: what_you_want
nodes.description: Describe what you are trying to find in natural language
